en_title: GTA 6 Hacker Moved to Prison for Retrial Two Years After Indefinite Sentence to Secure Hospital
cn_title: 《GTA6》黑客转入普通监狱，等待重新审判
subtitle: 泄露案再开庭
opus_summary: 2022年泄露《GTA6》的黑客Arion Kurtaj已从安全医院转入普通监狱，等待2026年11月重审。他曾在保释期间仅用Firestick、酒店电视和手机入侵Rockstar。

paragraphs.en: The hacker behind the massive GTA 6 leak in September 2022 has been released from indefinite imprisonment at a secure hospital and is now awaiting a retrial.
paragraphs.cn: 2022年9月《GTA6》大规模泄露事件背后的黑客已结束在安全医院的无限期拘禁，目前正等待重新审判。

paragraphs.en: Arion Kurtaj, a member of the notorious worldwide hacking group named Lapsus$, is waiting for his day in court once again after he was deemed unfit to stand trial in December 2023 due to a medical diagnosis of “acute autism.”
paragraphs.cn: Arion Kurtaj是臭名昭著的全球黑客组织Lapsus$成员。2023年12月，他因被诊断患有「重度自闭症」而被认定不适合受审，如今再次等待出庭。

paragraphs.en: After a jury determined that he had committed the hacks, Kurtaj was sentenced to imprisonment at a secure hospital, either for life or until he was deemed medically fit to stand trial again.
paragraphs.cn: 陪审团认定Kurtaj实施了黑客攻击后，他被判在安全医院拘禁，期限为终身，或直至医疗评估认定他重新具备受审能力。

paragraphs.en: That time has finally come, as BBC correspondent Joe Tidy confirmed on that Kurtaj is now awaiting a retrial in “normal prison,” set to take place in November 2026 — the same month GTA 6 is expected to release.
paragraphs.cn: 这一天终于到来。BBC记者Joe Tidy在[原文此处缺失内容]确认，Kurtaj目前正在「普通监狱」等待重审，庭审定于2026年11月举行，恰好与《GTA6》预计发售时间同月。

paragraphs.en: Thus far, nothing else is known about the case, nor how Kurtaj is being retried despite committing the hacking during a period of time when his mental state was so severe that it required hospitalization.
paragraphs.cn: 目前外界尚不了解案件的其他信息，也不清楚Kurtaj为何会受到重审，因为他实施黑客攻击时的精神状况据称严重到需要住院治疗。

paragraphs.en: Tidy stated on that he’s attempting to glean more information from authorities, but says police are being extremely tight-lipped about the situation to the point that it’s “like getting blood out of a stone.”
paragraphs.cn: Tidy在[原文此处缺失内容]表示，他正试图从有关部门获取更多信息，但警方对此事极度守口如瓶，想问出消息「就像从石头里榨血一样难」。

paragraphs.en: Kurtaj’s 2022 hack was unprecedented, leaking 90 clips from GTA 6, along with its source code, on a fan forum. What’s more, he was out on bail after hacking NVIDIA and in police protection at a Travelodge when he infiltrated Rockstar’s systems, using only an Amazon Firestick, the TV at his hotel, and a cell phone to pull off the cyberattack.
paragraphs.cn: Kurtaj在2022年发动的攻击规模空前，他在粉丝论坛泄露了90段《GTA6》视频以及游戏源代码。更离谱的是，他当时因入侵NVIDIA而处于保释期，并在警方保护下住在Travelodge酒店，却仅凭Amazon Firestick、酒店电视和一部手机便侵入了Rockstar系统。

paragraphs.en: Officials said Kurtaj had expressed violent behavior while in police custody, including "dozens of reports of injury or property damage," with the BBC reporting a mental health assessment that claimed he "continued to express the intent to return to cybercrime as soon as possible. He is highly motivated."
paragraphs.cn: 官员表示，Kurtaj在警方拘押期间曾表现出暴力行为，包括「数十起人员受伤或财物损坏报告」。BBC援引一份精神健康评估称，他「持续表达尽快重返网络犯罪的意图。他的动机极其强烈」。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 releases on November 19, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. You can find more information about the decade’s most-anticipated title on our hub.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》将于2026年11月19日登陆PlayStation 5和XBOX Series。有关这款十年来最受期待作品的更多信息，可在IGN专题页面查看。
